description: 100 varied short-form prompts for concurrent throughput demo. Each virtual user picks one at random per request. Topics span explanation, code, math, creative, trivia, and practical how-to so the aggregate load exercises a realistic distribution without privileging any single fast or slow path.
prompts: Explain why the sky is blue in two sentences.
What is the capital of Australia?
Write a haiku about the ocean at sunrise.
Convert 98.6 degrees Fahrenheit to Celsius and show the formula.
Name three famous painters from the Italian Renaissance.
Write a Python function that reverses a string.
Summarize the plot of Romeo and Juliet in three sentences.
What does DNS stand for and what does it do in one paragraph?
List five countries in Southeast Asia.
Write a limerick about a lazy cat.
Explain photosynthesis in one short paragraph.
What is 17 squared? Show the calculation.
Give me a two-sentence elevator pitch for a specialty coffee subscription startup.
How does a magnet work? Keep it simple.
Translate 'good morning' into Japanese, Spanish, and French.
Name the first five elements on the periodic table.
Write a SQL query to select all users older than 30 from a users table.
What causes rainbows?
Tell me one fun fact about octopuses.
Give me three practical tips for better sleep.
State the Pythagorean theorem and give one example.
Write a JavaScript function to check whether a number is prime.
Explain what a blockchain is to someone with no technical background.
Name five planets in our solar system and one interesting fact about each.
What is the difference between a CPU and a GPU?
Write a short bio for a fictional astronaut named Mira Okafor.
List the three primary colors of light.
Explain recursion using the factorial function as an example.
What does HTTP stand for?
Write one short motivational quote about perseverance.
Name three programming languages and give one use case for each.
What is the speed of light in meters per second?
Convert 1 mile to kilometers.
Give me the formula for the area of a circle.
What year did World War II end?
Write a bash one-liner to find files larger than 100 MB under the current directory.
Explain quantum entanglement in two sentences.
Name three musical instruments found in a symphony orchestra.
Summarize the plot of 1984 by George Orwell in three sentences.
Write a rhyming couplet about autumn leaves.
List five healthy snack ideas.
What causes thunder?
Give me the IPA pronunciation of the English word 'though'.
Tell me a short clean joke about a programmer.
State Newton's three laws of motion.
Explain the greenhouse effect in two sentences.
What is the tallest mountain in Europe?
Write a CSS rule that horizontally and vertically centers a div inside its parent.
List five famous scientists from the 20th century and one contribution each.
Explain the Fibonacci sequence and give its first ten terms.
Describe the Great Barrier Reef in one paragraph.
Write a persuasive short paragraph about the importance of recycling.
What is the chemical formula for water and why does it form that way?
Give me three reasons an adult might benefit from learning a new language.
Explain how a stock market works in two paragraphs.
Name five plays written by William Shakespeare.
Write a Python one-liner that sums a list of integers.
What is the difference between HTTP and HTTPS?
Explain what Kubernetes does in two sentences.
List five endangered animals.
Write the opening paragraph of a short story set in a lighthouse.
What is the square root of 144?
Name all seven continents.
Explain how binary search works and why it is O(log n).
Write a 200-character tweet announcing a new fitness app.
What is the capital of Canada?
Give me three creative pizza topping combinations.
Explain gravity in a single sentence.
Name five currencies in use across Europe.
Write a haiku about a quiet rainy afternoon.
Convert 5 feet to meters.
What is the difference between weather and climate?
Name three famous landmarks in Paris.
Write a regular expression that matches a standard email address.
List the seven days of the week in French.
What is an algorithm? Give an everyday example.
Tell me about the history of pizza in two sentences.
Write a metaphor for hope that doesn't involve a candle or a bird.
What is a mitochondrion and what does it do?
Write a short dialogue between a tired customer and a cheerful barista.
List five benefits of regular exercise.
What is the largest ocean on Earth?
Write a SQL query that counts the number of rows in an orders table.
Name three breeds of dog and one characteristic of each.
What is the Turing test and why is it still discussed?

Explain supply and demand in two sentences.

Name the four members of the Beatles.
What is machine learning in one paragraph?
